parameters:
Whoa, we got a sexy swimsuit! Mom, let's wear this and
play at the oasis.

Ugh... it smells like squid...! No way I'm wearing
this smelly thing...

Aww... I'll take responsibility and wash it until the
smell's gone, okay?

Hmm... well, maybe I'll consider it once the smell's
gone...

Fighting monsters is tough... but winning feels great
and it's a good way to relieve stress!
You know, Mom, you're getting stronger and stronger...
Hehe... your mom's still in her growth period~
Appraised the item dropped by the boss...

(The shining pearl seems to be an important item for
making a Dragon Orb...)
You need a pickaxe stronger than iron...
You need a pickaxe stronger than iron...
You need a pickaxe stronger than iron...

Your bond level isn't high enough... (Your bond level
increases as you progress your relationship with your
mother through H-scenes.)
Hint...An important event at the abandoned mine site.

events.name: アナルホジリスライムイベ

parameters:
~Anal Probing Slime Habitat~ They're an endangered
species, so please treat them with care. Exterminating
them is out of the question.

They're happy if you let them probe your anus. They're
harmless to humans, so just wait patiently. They might
give you items as souvenirs.
What's wrong? What does that sign say?

It says the slimes around here are harmless, so we
shouldn't exterminate them.

As mother collapsed exhausted from double penetration
orgasm, I and the Anal Probing Slime praised each
other's efforts and shook hands...

But... maybe it's just me, but my stomach feels
better...

Thanks to the Anal Probing Slime, her intestinal
environment improved, increasing Risa's attack power
by +3 and max HP by +10.

Sanity decreased due to double penetration orgasm! (It
doesn't mean anything in particular)

events.name: クラーケンの巣初回イベント

parameters: Sniff sniff... It smells fishy... like the seashore...

Sniff sniff... Definitely... So maybe the boss this
time is seafood-related~
If it's fish, then fire might be its weakness...?

Hmm... The last boss was weak to fire, so it's
unlikely they'd have the same weakness in a row...

Maybe it's better to try learning skills of other
attributes besides fire!

Light a bonfire? (You can save and return at the
bonfire.)

You need a torch to light a bonfire.
(Let's make one at the workbench.)
